title: cystium ineptum
side_effects: Cystium ineptum can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, stomach ulcers, and gastrointestinal issues in individuals with sensitive stomachs. Prolonged use of the plant's extract can lead to headaches, dizziness, and fatigue in some users. In extreme cases, excessive consumption of cystium ineptum can result in liver damage and kidney problems. Additionally, interactions with other medications, such as blood thinners and certain antidepressants, can exacerbate these side effects.
